rulings.Case Title: BENJAMIN WOLFF VS. JAY COCHRANE et al
rulings.Rulings: THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLTF HAS NO STANDING TO SUE COAST INSURANCE UNTIL HE OBTAINS A JUDGMENT AGAINST THE INSURED. ANY AMENDMENT MUST COMPLY WITH CAL.RULE OF COURT 312(g). (JH)

rulings.Case Title: AGUILAR & SEBASTINELLI VS. 1700 CALIFORNIA STREET, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: THE DEMURRER TO THE 1ST C/A FOR RECISSION IS OVERRULED. THE DEMURRER TO THE 5TH C/A FOR PROMISSORY FRAUD IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THE MOTION TO STRIKE THE PRAYER FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THE 4TH C/A IS GRANTED. (JH)
